title: Spherified Lamb Koftas with Crisp Vegetable Skewers
description: A unique twist on traditional lamb koftas, featuring spherified ingredients and a side of crunchy vegetable skewers.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large mixing bowl, combine lamb mince, x, and winey vegetables. Mix well.
Add the spherify agent to the mixture and stir until combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small koftas.
Thread the chopped crisp onto skewers.
Grill the koftas for 3-4 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 63°C.
Meanwhile, grill the vegetable skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until tender.
Serve the spherified lamb koftas with the crispy vegetable skewers.
